description: Learn how to use the Scrapfly API to crawl entire websites, extract data, and bypass anti-bot protections. This course will cover the basics of web scraping, how to use the Scrapfly API, and advanced techniques for data extraction and processing.

lessons.title: What is Web Scraping?
lessons.description: Introduction to the concept of web scraping, its applications, and the benefits of using the Scrapfly API

lessons.title: Web Scraping Laws and Ethics
lessons.description: Overview of the legal and ethical considerations when it comes to web scraping, including the importance of respecting website terms of service

lessons.title: Setting Up Your First Crawl
lessons.description: Step-by-step guide on how to create a new crawl job, configure crawling rules, and retrieve results using the Scrapfly API

lessons.title: Understanding API Documentation and Tools
lessons.description: Introduction to the Scrapfly API documentation, tools, and resources available to help developers get started

lessons.title: Using LLM-Powered Data Extraction
lessons.description: How to use the Scrapfly API's LLM-powered data extraction feature to transform raw HTML into clean JSON, markdown, or structured data

lessons.title: Handling JavaScript-Heavy Websites
lessons.description: Techniques for crawling and extracting data from JavaScript-heavy websites using the Scrapfly API's headless browser capabilities

lessons.title: Bypassing Anti-Bot Protections
lessons.description: Strategies for bypassing anti-bot protections, including fingerprinting, CAPTCHAs, and behavior-based detection using the Scrapfly API

lessons.title: Optimizing Crawl Performance and Efficiency
lessons.description: Tips and best practices for optimizing crawl performance, including configuring crawl rules, handling errors, and monitoring progress

lessons.title: Using Scrapfly API for AI Training
lessons.description: How to use the Scrapfly API to collect data for AI training, including crawling websites for images, videos, and user-generated content

lessons.title: Web Scraping for E-commerce and Marketing
lessons.description: Applications of web scraping in e-commerce and marketing, including product research, competitor analysis, and social media monitoring
